zh.Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世
zh.Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England,: 英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh.Kirby Bellars, Melton Mowbray, Leicester: 英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha De Bingham於1310年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世時，她的父親Richard Bingham46歲，母親Parnelle Warmwell41歲。她於1334年與Ralph De Bellers II在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1345年在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha De Bingham于1310年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世时，她的父亲Richard Bingham46岁，母亲Parnelle Warmwell41岁。她于1334年与Ralph De Bellers II在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1345年在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset) and Irish (County Mayo): habitational name from Bingham (Nottinghamshire). The placename is probably from an Old English folk-name Bynningas (‘the people associated with a man named Bynna’), or possibly from an unattested Old English word bing ‘a kettle-shaped hollow’, + Old English hām ‘homestead’.
Irish (Ulster, of Scottish origin): altered form of   Bigham  .
American shortened and altered form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames such as   Bingenheimer  .

variants.name: Ingham
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from any of the places called Ingham, particularly in Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Suffolk. The placename is from the Old English personal name Inga + hām ‘homestead’. In Yorkshire this name was sometimes confused with Bingham in the 18th century.
English (of Norman origin): variant of the obsolete Norman surname Engaine; see Gain .

variants.name: Bigham
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire) and Irish: habitational name from either Bigholm in Beith parish (Ayrshire) or Bigholms in Langholm parish (Dumfriesshire). The second element of the placename is from Older Scots holm (Old Norse holmr) ‘islet’, ‘raised land in a marsh’, ‘a stretch of low-lying land beside a river; a meadow’. The first element may be an unattested Older Scots bigge, a shortened form of bigging ‘building’. The name was taken to Ulster in the 17th and 18th centuries, where it was used interchangeably with Bingham .

variants.name: Bingenheimer
meanings: German and Jewish (from Germany): habitational name for someone from Bingenheim on the Eder river (Hesse). Compare   Bingham  .

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha De Bingham was born in 1310, in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Richard Bingham, was 46 and her mother, Parnelle Warmwell, was 41. She married Ralph De Bellers II in 1334, in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1345, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agatha De Bingham est née en 1310, à Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bingham, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Parnelle Warmwell, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph De Bellers II en 1334, à Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1345, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha De Bingham 1310 in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Bingham 46 und ihre Mutter Parnelle Warmwell 41. Sie hat 1334 in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Ralph De Bellers II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1345 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha De Bingham è nata il nel 1310 nel Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Richard Bingham, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Parnelle Warmwell, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Ralph De Bellers II nel 1334, nel Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1345, nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha De Binghamが1310年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアビンガムで生まれた時，父Richard Binghamは46歳，母Parnelle Warmwellは41歳であった。1334年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルビー ベラーズでRalph De Bellers IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1345年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha De Bingham(이)가 1310년 영국 노틴그함실르 빙함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Bingham(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Parnelle Warmwell(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 커비 벨라러스에서 Ralph De Bellers II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1345년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha De Bingham nasceu em 1310, em Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bingham, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Parnelle Warmwell, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph De Bellers II em 1334, em Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1345, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha De Bingham родилась в 1310 г. в местности бингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Bingham было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Parnelle Warmwell, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph De Bellers II в 1334 г. в местности кирби белларс, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1345 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agatha De Bingham nació en 1310, en Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Bingham, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Parnelle Warmwell, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Ralph De Bellers II en 1334, en Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1345, en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
